site.name: Malaika Jones
site.intro: I am a Korea-based South African content creator sharing authentic insights into daily life in South Korea from a global perspective. I create engaging, informative, and visually clean content that bridges Korean culture with international audiences.
site.bio: From navigating daily life to maintaining curly hair, tech UGC, to beauty clinics and make-up tips, I document real experiences that resonate with foreigners, travelers, and globally curious audiences.

stats.label: perspective I bring to your campaign

testimonials.quote: We really enjoyed working with Malaika on a video introducing a Korean skin clinic experience. The content was produced with a very high level of care and attention to detail. What stood out most was how smoothly she structured the story while keeping the clinic information clear, polished, informative, and authentic.
testimonials.author: Seon Collective
